Filter organization units by attribute values.
Supported operators: `eq`, `gt`, `lt`.
Filterable attributes: `name`, `handle`, `description`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`.
Format: `attribute operator "value"`.
Examples:
- `name eq "Engineering"`
- `handle eq "frontend"`
- `createdAt gt "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z"`

Create, retrieve, update, delete, and list organization units using their hierarchical handle path.

item.name: Get an organization unit by hierarchical handle path

request.name: Get an organization unit by hierarchical handle path

variable.description:
(Required) Hierarchical path of organization unit handles separated by forward slashes.
Examples:
- `engineering` - Gets the root OU with handle "engineering"
- `engineering/frontend` - Gets the "frontend" OU under "engineering"
- `engineering/frontend/ui` - Gets the "ui" OU under "engineering/frontend"

(Required) Hierarchical path of organization unit handles separated by forward slashes.
Examples:
- `engineering` - Gets the root OU with handle "engineering"
- `engineering/frontend` - Gets the "frontend" OU under "engineering"
- `engineering/frontend/ui` - Gets the "ui" OU under "engineering/frontend"

Create and manage the organizational hierarchy. Organization units can be nested and are used to scope applications, users, groups, and policies.
